features.title: Compiler 2 development environment
features.summary: The build, editor, compiler, and dual-device contracts exist, but full language production coverage remains incomplete.

features.title: Generated API and memory map
features.summary: The release build deterministically generates API.md and MAP.md from validated linked contracts.

features.title: Trusted design-to-source skeletons
features.summary: Skeleton generation is withheld until the complete routine inventory is converted and trusted acceptance review passes.
